playbook.intent: No internal RAG → faion methodology corpus embedded as reasoning prior for an in-house vertical agent with ingestion, retrieval, eval, governance.
playbook.scope: Embed the faion knowledge base as a reasoning prior for an in-house vertical agent: ingestion, chunking, retrieval, reranking, eval, plus governance / licence / drift hygiene. Output: agent answers cite faion methodologies with traceable IDs.

success-criteria.criterion: Chunked + indexed faion corpus reachable from agent
Eval pipeline scoring retrieval and generation
Drift alert wired on retrieval distribution

stage.name: Ingest & Chunk
stage.intent: Chunk faion methodologies by document structure and semantics.

tasks.task: Walk knowledge/ tree and extract semantic units

stage.decision-gate: Advance when chunk count and avg-token length are stable.

stage.name: Embed & Retrieve
stage.intent: Pick embedding model, cache aggressively, wire hybrid search.

stage.name: Rerank & Compose
stage.intent: Two-stage rerank with diversity; wire into agent context.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when NDCG and answer-grounding both improve.

stage.name: Eval & Monitor
stage.intent: End-to-end RAG eval + production monitoring + drift signal.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when drift signal correctly fires on a planted shift.

stage.name: Governance
stage.intent: Licence audit and AI Act / governance hygiene.
stage.decision-gate: Ship only when licence + governance both pass.

extra.value: [End-user-facing search UI — not the goal, Multi-tenant corpus isolation — out of scope]
[Existing vertical agent with at least one tool slot, Vector DB or readiness to deploy one]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content faion-methodology-corpus-into-agent --format md, agent: faion get-content faion-methodology-corpus-into-agent --format context, json: faion get-content faion-methodology-corpus-into-agent --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
